_comment: Optional config for outsystems-mentor-polling-behavior.
All keys are optional — delete any key to revert to its default.
The skill never breaks if this file is missing or partially filled.
Reload takes effect on the next skill invocation (no restart needed).

polling._comment: Sleep cadence in seconds between status checks per tier.

_comment: Reclassify individual MCP tools when their behavior changes on your tenant.
Values: 1 = synchronous (no sleep), 2 = fast async (tier2CadenceSecs), 3 = long async (tier3CadenceSecs).
Current default classification (do not edit this comment block — edit the values below):
Tier 1 (sync):       app_list, app_info, app_refs, env_list, env_apps,
context_screens, context_entities, context_actions,
context_roles, context_structures, context_themes, context_search
Tier 2 (fast async): publish_start, deploy_start, extlib_upload, test_setup_start
Tier 3 (long async): mentor_get_run
Example: if publish_start now finishes in <10s on your tenant, set:
"publish_start": 1
Example: if a new tool 'my_new_tool' behaves like fast async, set:
"my_new_tool": 2
Controls the 'Tier Review Signal' panel in index.html.
The signal fires when the rolling average Mentor run duration across
recent sessions drops below avgMentorDurationSecs, suggesting Mentor
may now behave more like a Tier 2 tool than Tier 3.
Set enabled=false to suppress the panel entirely.
avgMentorDurationSecs: if the rolling average Mentor run duration
across the last minSessionsRequired sessions drops below this value,
the signal fires. Default 60s — if Mentor consistently finishes
in <60s, consider whether Tier 3 (30s cadence) is still appropriate.
staleSessionDays: sessions older than this are dimmed in index.html.
They are NOT deleted — dimming is visual only.
Set to 0 to disable dimming (all sessions shown at full opacity).
